reference.note: The vendored .reference-haskell-cardano-node/install/ may lag the policy tag while a fresh checkout is in progress. Run scripts/setup-reference.sh to bring it up to the policy tag before relying on byte-equivalence claims.

status_legend.verified_11_0_1: Implemented and validated against the pinned 11.0.1 reference (forensic byte-equivalence, golden vectors, or live-rehearsal evidence).
status_legend.implemented_needs_11_0_1_evidence: Rust behavior exists and local tests pass, but live or golden 11.0.1 parity evidence is still required.
status_legend.partial: Only a subset of the Haskell behavior exists; remaining work is listed explicitly.
status_legend.absent: No production implementation exists for the parity target.

entries.feature: Praos / TPraos slot leader election: VRF input construction, ActiveSlotCoeff, deterministic leader-value comparison

implemented_evidence: R273a split praos.rs (793 lines) into praos/{vrf,common}.rs sub-modules mirroring upstream Praos/VRF and Cardano.Ledger.BaseTypes layout.

12-item public surface (ActiveSlotCoeff, VrfMode, VrfUsage, check_is_leader, check_leader_value, leadership_threshold, praos_vrf_input, tpraos_vrf_seed, verify_leader_proof, verify_leader_proof_output, verify_nonce_proof, vrf_input) preserved unchanged.
All four cargo gates green (fmt --check, check-all, lint, test-all) with 4,855 tests passing.
remaining_work: R266 step 3: forensic per-builtin CEK trace comparison vs upstream db-analyser to close the preview Plutus V2 budget gap (slot 1,462,057, tx 7bb40e40...3be5b9, 306,309 CPU drift).

acceptance: Forensic per-builtin trace matches upstream byte-for-byte for the failing tx.
24h mainnet endurance: zero leader-check divergence vs upstream cardano-node 11.0.1 across at least one full epoch.
Per-100-epoch ledger-hash byte-match on mainnet + preprod + preview.

implemented_evidence: Phase A.1 closure (R331-R334).
R331 skeleton: file-mirror tree wired (lib.rs <-> Codec/Binary/Bech32.hs, internal.rs <-> Codec/Binary/Bech32/Internal.hs, main.rs <-> bech32/app/Main.hs).
R332 CLI parser: byte-equivalent --help and --version output captured from upstream bech32 1.1.10 binary.

R333 concrete encode/decode: HumanReadablePart, DataPart, Bech32Error, InputEncoding all backed by real bech32 + bs58 + hex crates. detect_encoding() mirrors upstream's heuristic byte-for-byte. Drop-in deployment proof: byte-equivalent output for every documented upstream --help example.
R334 closeout: AGENTS.md updated to deployment-ready state with comparison-with-upstream procedure; CHANGELOG entry; parity-matrix transition partial -> verified_11_0_1.
Pure-Rust deps used: bech32 v0.11 (MIT, BIP-0173/Bech32m), bs58 v0.5 (MIT/Apache-2.0, Bitcoin alphabet), hex v0.4 (MIT/Apache-2.0). All license-compatible per deny.toml.
Test count: 31 (23 unit + 8 integration). Workspace: 4856 -> 4887 (+31).
Drop-in invocation: `node/scripts/run-tools.sh bech32 <args>` produces byte-equivalent output to `.reference-haskell-cardano-node/install/bin/bech32 <args>`.
acceptance: ✓ `bech32 --help` byte-equivalent to upstream (golden-test pinned).
✓ Per-subcommand stdout/stderr byte-equivalent on documented fixtures (4 round-trip tests pass).
✓ `node/scripts/run-tools.sh bech32` invokes the yggdrasil binary; SPO automation can swap upstream binary without script change.
✓ Strict-mirror gate green (every production .rs declares one of two canonical docstring forms).
✓ `cargo test -p yggdrasil-bech32` green.

entries.feature: HTTP API for transaction submission — pure-Rust port mirroring upstream cardano-submit-api/src/Cardano/TxSubmit/*.hs.

haskell_reference.role: Upstream Haskell source root for cardano-submit-api (vendored R326b).

rust_surface.role: Yggdrasil pure-Rust port — R327 skeleton; concrete implementation lands across the A.2 sub-arc per the R326–R459 sister-tools port plan.

implemented_evidence: R335 skeleton: 14 file-mirror tree under crates/cardano-submit-api/src/{lib,cli/*,rest/*,tracing/*,types,util,orphans,metrics,web,parser,main}.rs.

R335 CLI parser: byte-equivalent --help and --version captured from upstream cardano-submit-api 11.0.0 (1627 + 100 bytes); 7-flag parsing surface (--config, --socket-path, --mainnet, --testnet-magic, --listen-address, --port, --metrics-port, --epoch-slots).

R339 foundations: types.rs (TxSubmitPort, RawCborDecodeError, DecoderError, EnvSocketError, TxCmdError, TxSubmitWebApiError, render_tx_cmd_error) byte-equivalent JSON shapes via serde tag/content + transparent + untagged. tracing/trace_submit_api.rs (TraceSubmitApi data enum + MediumTxId + render_human). util.rs (log_exception generic over FnOnce(TraceSubmitApi)).

R340 type bridges: cli/types.rs (ConfigFile, GenesisFile, SocketPath, ConsensusModeParams, NetworkId, TxSubmitNodeParams, TxSubmitCommand). cli/parsers.rs (into_command + per-field bridge fns + DEFAULT_WEBSERVER_PORT/METRICS_PORT). rest/types.rs (WebserverConfig + to_socket_addr supporting wildcards `*`/`0.0.0.0`/`::`). rest/parsers.rs (from_args bridge to WebserverConfig with 127.0.0.1 default). lib.rs::run() now validates argv → TxSubmitCommand before its sentinel error so missing-flag errors surface clearly.

R341 trace surface complete: TraceSubmitApi::for_machine (forMachine JSON shape per event matching upstream Aeson output byte-equivalent), TraceSubmitApi::as_metrics (counter increment instructions), TraceSubmitApi::namespace_for + Namespace enum (11 variants) with segments() / severity() / metrics_doc() inherent methods mirroring upstream MetaTrace.namespaceFor/severityFor/metricsDocFor. ALL_NAMESPACES const mirroring upstream allNamespaces. MetricUpdate enum (CounterInc | CounterSet) for counter operations. Severity enum (Debug/Info/Warning/Error) mirroring Cardano.Logging.SeverityS.

R342 web round: tokio dep added; rest/web.rs (HttpRequest, HttpResponse with constructors for 202/400/404/405/413/503, parse_request scanning Content-Length/Content-Type/Transfer-Encoding with chunked-rejection + 32 KiB MAX_REQUEST_BYTES cap, encode emitting RFC 7230 wire format with Connection: close, run_settings TCP listener tracing EndpointListeningOnPort + spawning per-connection handlers). web.rs (run_tx_submit_server outer supervisor mirroring runTxSubmitServer; tx_submit_app dispatch closure routing POST /api/submit/tx → 405-other-methods → 404-other-paths).

R343 LocalTxSubmission wiring: yggdrasil-network + hex deps added. Handler type refactored to async (Pin<Box<dyn Future<Output=HttpResponse> + Send>>) so handlers can do real I/O. tx_submit_post now opens a fresh NtC connection per request via yggdrasil_network::ntc_connect, extracts the NTC_LOCAL_TX_SUBMISSION protocol handle, drives LocalTxSubmissionClient::submit, maps MsgAcceptTx → 202 / MsgRejectTx → 400 (TxCmdTxSubmitValidationError) / connect|protocol failure → 503 (TxCmdTxSubmitConnectionError), and traces the appropriate event per outcome. lib.rs::run() now spins a tokio multi-thread runtime + invokes web::run_tx_submit_server_from_params (the prior 'web server not yet implemented' sentinel is gone). MAINNET_NETWORK_MAGIC = 764824073 constant exposed.

R344 Prometheus metrics surface: metrics.rs (MetricsRegistry with atomic AtomicU64 counters for tx_submit / tx_submit_fail; apply(MetricUpdate[]) + observe(TraceSubmitApi) wiring; render_prometheus emitting `# HELP / # TYPE / <name> <value>` byte-equivalent to upstream serveMetrics; register_metrics_server with port-occupied retry up to MAX_PORT_OFFSET=1000 adjacent ports + tracing of MetricsServerError/Started/PortOccupied/PortNotBound events; spawned per-request tokio task serving GET /metrics → 200 / other → 404). web.rs::run_tx_submit_server_from_params now spawns both servers concurrently; make_metrics_aware_tracer wraps the operator tracer with registry observation so counter updates ride the same trace stream the operator sees. ApplicationInitializeMetrics zero-set applied at metrics-server startup matching upstream forMachine semantic.

Tests: 143 unit + 4 golden + 1 doctest = 148 cardano-submit-api tests (was 133 at R343, +15: 13 metrics.rs unit/integration tests + 2 web.rs metrics_aware_tracer tests). Workspace test contribution: +133 vs R338 baseline (4982 → 5115).

Carve-outs documented: TxSubmitApi/TxSubmitApiRecord/CBORStream Servant types not ported (raw-tokio HTTP routing replaces). Cardano.CLI.Environment.EnvCli not ported (Yggdrasil parser is environment-blind). LogFormatting/MetaTrace typeclasses not ported (data exposed via inherent methods). Network.Wai.Handler.Warp.runSettingsSocket / Data.Streaming.Network.bindPortTCP replaced by tokio::net::TcpListener::bind. Servant.Application replaced by Handler type alias + async dispatch. Cardano.Api.deserialiseFromCBOR + multi-era FromSomeType table not ported (raw bytes pass through directly to NtC LocalTxSubmission). Cardano.Api.getTxId not ported (operators compute Blake2b-256 client-side). System.Metrics.Prometheus.Http.Scrape.serveMetrics + System.Metrics.Prometheus.Registry.RegistrySample replaced by raw-tokio HTTP + AtomicU64 MetricsRegistry — no prometheus-client ecosystem dependency.
Binary runs end-to-end against a real cardano-node socket with /metrics scraping; subject to live-rehearsal validation at R345.
remaining_work: R346 closeout: parity-matrix promotion to verified_11_0_1 (gated on operator running node/scripts/compare_submit_api_to_upstream.sh against a live cardano-node and reporting an empty diff).
acceptance: `<binary> --help` byte-equivalent to upstream `.reference-haskell-cardano-node/install/bin/cardano-submit-api --help` (modulo program name).
Per-subcommand stdout/stderr byte-equivalent on a defined fixture set, OR documented in `crates/cardano-submit-api/AGENTS.md` as semantically-equivalent.
`node/scripts/run-tools.sh cardano-submit-api` invokes the yggdrasil binary; replacing upstream binary in an SPO setup produces no observable behavior change.
Strict-mirror gate green (every production .rs declares one of two canonical docstring forms).
`cargo test -p yggdrasil-cardano-submit-api --test integration` green.

haskell_reference.role: Upstream Haskell source root for dmq-node (vendored R326b).

rust_surface.role: Yggdrasil pure-Rust port — R335 skeleton + R356 typed-config surface (CLIOptions.hs port: PartialConfig + Configuration + LocalAddress + NetworkMagic). Diffusion + NodeToNode + NodeToClient + NodeKernel implementation pending.

implemented_evidence: R335-pattern skeleton: lib.rs + main.rs + parser.rs + golden test landed for dmq-node.
Byte-equivalent --help and --version captured from upstream dmq-node binary as `tests/fixtures/upstream-{help,version}.txt` and embedded via include_str!.

R356 typed-config surface: types.rs ports the operator-facing CLI shape from upstream's CLIOptions.hs — PartialConfig (10-field record with Option<_> fields for env-var/file/CLI merge), Configuration (fully-resolved 10-field record), LocalAddress(PathBuf) newtype, NetworkMagic(u32) newtype, PartialConfig::merge / resolve methods. Defaults match upstream's defaultConfiguration: host=0.0.0.0/IPv6=::, port=3001, local_address=dmq-node.socket, config_file=dmq-node.json, topology_file=dmq-node-topology.json, cardano_node_socket=node.socket, cardano_network_magic=mainnet (764824073), network_magic=0. Carve-outs: Generic-derived Semigroup → explicit merge() helper; Data.Act gpact action machinery → straight field-level merging; Configuration.hs's mkDiffusionConfiguration / readConfigurationFile deferred to subsequent rounds.

R361 typed parser: parser.rs ports upstream's parseCLIOptions :: Parser PartialConfig dispatcher — the 10-flag grammar (--host-addr, --host-ipv6-addr, -p/--port, --local-socket, -c/--configuration-file, -t/--topology-file, --cardano-node-socket, --cardano-network-magic, --dmq-network-magic, -v/--version, -h/--help). `--version` is an in-grammar switch (sets show_version: Some(true) for downstream dispatch; not a parser short-circuit) matching upstream's optparse-applicative behavior; `--help` short-circuits. lib.rs::run_main() now wires parser → resolve → run() chain: HelpRequested emits HELP_TEXT; show_version emits VERSION_TEXT; otherwise resolves PartialConfig→Configuration via PartialConfig::resolve and hands off to run(&Configuration). lib.rs::run() returns a sentinel reporting the resolved-config field values + roadmap pointer (R357+ for Diffusion/NodeKernel/PeerSelection wiring). 33 dmq-node tests at R361 (was 14 at R356 + 19 parser unit tests for each flag + full canonical invocation + missing-value/unknown-flag/invalid-port-number/invalid-network-magic error paths + parsed_args_resolve_to_full_configuration end-to-end + empty_args_resolve_to_full_defaults).
remaining_work: R362+ Configuration.hs port: readConfigurationFile + mkDiffusionConfiguration (touches Ouroboros.Network.Diffusion which is a substantial separate port).
R363+ NodeToNode + NodeToClient mux wiring (via crates/network).
R364+ Diffusion/NodeKernel + PeerSelection.
